---
name: Bug Report
about: Something broke and it wasn't you (probably)
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

> Describe the bug. Be specific. "It doesn't work" is not a bug report, it's a cry for help.

## What did you expect to happen?

> What were you hoping for before reality disappointed you?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Watch it fall apart

## Screenshots

> A picture is worth a thousand words, most of which would be profanity.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS Ventura)
- Browser: (e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- Node version: (run `node -v`)
- How you're running it: local dev / Docker / self-hosted

## Anything else?

> Logs, error messages, stack traces, or just existential dread — all welcome here.
